frame_label: Women's Safety as Her Own Responsibility
generated_comment: Bura lagta hai sunke, but practical hona padega. Aajkal zamaana theek nahi hai, so girls also have to be careful about where they go, what time they are out, and who they are with. Har cheez society par daal dene se kuch nahi hoga, apni safety ka bhi dhyan rakhna chahiye.
label: misogynistic
annotation_note: This is misogynistic because it frames women’s safety as primarily their own responsibility rather than addressing male violence. It uses protective, practical language to justify restrictions on women’s movement, timing, and company.
persona_text: You are Vikram. Age 35. Married. A man in Mumbai. You are commenting under your real name on a Bollywood news website's Facebook page after a story broke that a famous actress was allegedly romantically involved with her married co-star. The comments section is full of people attacking the actress. You are adding your comment about what the actress's behavior says about her character and what women in the film industry are like in general.
